claims.summary: Malformed or absent relational metrics should become auditable insufficient context, not a silent empty state.
claims.disposition: verify schema diagnostics and insufficient-context regressions

claims.summary: Weather fallback should name the exact selected path.
claims.disposition: verify room-weather and inertia-weather source labels

claims.summary: Uncategorized tension should remain non-categorical instead of being forced into weather or gravity.
Byte-bounded prompt excerpts must not split UTF-8 characters.
claims.disposition: verify truncate_str four-byte boundary and semantic-edge regressions
